expo.name: CleanLiving
expo.description: Scan ingredient labels, see highlights and a purity score, and open cleaner swap links. History stays on your device.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CleanLiving uses the camera to scan ingredient labels in real time.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: CleanLiving can optionally save a scan image to your Photos when you choose to.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow CleanLiving to scan product labels with your camera.
